figure.title: 64-byte TL Flit Mirrored View
figure.purpose: Illustrates the mapping and byte packing/swizzling of message bits across the 16 sectors of a 64-byte TL Flit.

technical_summary: Displays the layout of a 64-byte TL Flit divided into 16 sectors.
Shows the detailed bit/byte mapping from logical message bits (M0, M1, etc.) to physical byte positions in the lower and upper halves of the flit.
Details specific byte indices (e.g., S127.B0) mapped into the 64-byte structure.

packet_layout.description: Divided into 16 sectors, with lower and upper halves shown.

critical_facts: The mapping of data into the TL Flit involves a complex mirroring and interleaving of bytes across sectors.
